---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the feature is and why it's needed.

## Problem Statement
Is your feature request related to a problem? A clear and concise description of what the problem is.

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Cases
Describe the use cases and scenarios where this feature would be valuable.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Implementation Notes
Any technical considerations or implementation suggestions.

## Related Issues
Link to related issues or feature requests.

## Priority
- [ ] Critical (Blocks other features or deployment)
- [ ] High (Significant impact on users)
- [ ] Medium (Standard priority feature)
- [ ] Low (Nice-to-have improvement)

## Additional Context
Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
